overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval great hall interior with Gothic stone architecture, wooden dining furniture, and warm candlelight illumination. The scene appears to be rendered in a game engine, showcasing detailed textures and atmospheric lighting with several figures seated at tables.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval great hall with Gothic stone architecture, featuring pointed archways, massive stone pillars, and wooden dining furniture. Warm candlelight and wall sconces illuminate the space where several figures sit at tables. A large heraldic banner hangs in the center background, and the scene maintains a consistent atmospheric perspective throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a medieval great hall, capturing the atmospheric stillness of a Gothic interior. It begins with a wide view of the space, emphasizing the massive stone pillars and pointed archways that define the architecture. As the eye lingers, the warm glow from candlelight and wall sconces reveals figures seated at wooden dining furniture, grounding the scene in a lived-in environment. The perspective then settles on a large heraldic banner hanging in the center background, completing the composition of the dimly lit hall.
